title: EasySwap
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod that allows a togglable attribute swapping experience with a simple keybind.
body:
A simple Minecraft: Java Edition mod for Fabric that allows the easy toggling of attribute swapping by using a custom keybind (defaults to R). Built as a Quality-of-Life modification for Minecraft Player vs. Player Combat and not considered a cheat nor built on an exploited framework.

### USAGE

This mod allows you to toggle swapping to a specific inventory slot whenever you left click/punch. To toggle, press R. Keybinds are also customizable.

** DEVELOPED AS A COMPLETE SOLO PROJECT. NO GENERATIVE AI WAS USED WHEN MAKING THIS **
